summary: Exceptional execution: worker delivered a complete premium visual redesign of the canasta scorer with all required components (GameSetup, ScoreBoard, HandScoringForm, HandHistory, Stepper, WinCelebration), matching the design system spec precisely (light theme, glassmorphism cards, indigo accents, orange CTAs, green felt aesthetic). Verification was comprehensive (7 passing checks including build, lint, git push, and design constraints), cost was lean at $2.64, and output is immediately deployable with zero follow-up needed. The only minor gap is the SUMMARY.md could have been slightly more detailed about specific file changes, but this is cosmetic and doesn't impact usability.
